name: l2_powered_nearfield_wake_reference_manifest
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredNearfieldWakeReferenceManifest lists hover cruise OpenFOAM rotor-response coefficient lookup shape-guard curve-shape diagnostics and combined nearfield reference artifacts behind the combined gate.
note: Primary reviewed export manifest for mature nearfield wake reference artifacts.

name: l2_powered_nearfield_wake_reference_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredNearfieldWakeReferenceGate supplies combined hover cruise OpenFOAM reference package readiness coefficient lookup shape-guard diagnostics and inherited CT/CP/J shape diagnostics.
note: Combined gate dependency.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_reference_table
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReferenceTable supplies compact hover ground and ceiling wake reference rows.
note: Hover reference artifact dependency.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_reference_table
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReferenceTable supplies compact forward flight skew wake reference rows.
note: Cruise reference artifact dependency.

name: ct_cp_j_openfoam_dimensional_reference_table
value: PropellerArchiveCtCpJOpenFoamDimensionalReferenceTable supplies compact OpenFOAM SI rotor-response rows with lookup and inherited shape-guard diagnostics.
note: OpenFOAM rotor-response artifact dependency.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_reference_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReferenceHandoff gates hover surface wake reference material after lab validation and error budget readiness.
note: Hover handoff dependency.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_reference_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReferenceHandoff gates cruise skew wake reference material after lab validation and error budget readiness.
note: Cruise handoff dependency.

name: ct_cp_j_openfoam_dimensional_reference_handoff
value: PropellerArchiveCtCpJOpenFoamDimensionalReferenceHandoff gates OpenFOAM dimensional rotor-response material after lookup CFD residual and solver QA readiness.
note: OpenFOAM handoff dependency.

name: ct_cp_j_openfoam_solver_quality_blocker_report
value: PropellerArchiveCtCpJOpenFoamSolverQualityBlockerReport supplies compact OpenFOAM solver-quality blocker count and next-action diagnostics.
note: OpenFOAM solver-quality blocker dependency.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live powered nearfield wake validation evidence.
note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.

name: ct_cp_j_openfoam_dimensional_reference_materialization_gate
value: PropellerArchiveCtCpJOpenFoamDimensionalReferenceMaterializationGate records the OpenFOAM materialization dependency on reviewed CT/CP/J lookup reference rows for manifest consumers.
note: Manifest dependency exposing why OpenFOAM rotor-response artifacts remain blocked before lookup reference review.
